Goal: a bright, glowing white stone monument
Instruction: Cross the yellow-striped crosswalk heading straight towards the bright, glowing billboard in the distance. Walk past the billboard, keeping it on your right, and continue straight onto the reddish-brown paved sidewalk. Keep the metal fence with circular decorations on your left as you walk straight under the streetlights and past the trees. Continue along this path until you reach a bright, glowing white stone monument on your right, just before another crosswalk. Stop at this monument, as it is your destination.
